title: phyllorkis biseta
intro: Phyllorkis biseta, also known as the two-seeded orchid, is a species of orchid found in tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phyllorkis biseta include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating fever and skin conditions. Phyllorkis biseta can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional Ayurvedic remedies, making it a valuable plant in folk medicine.
